cases.name: gold
cases.diff:
diff --git a/counter/counter.go b/counter/counter.go
index 2b21749..8db5f6d 100644
--- a/counter/counter.go
+++ b/counter/counter.go
@@ -27,3 +27,10 @@ func (c *SafeCounter) Get(key string) int {
 	defer c.mu.Unlock()
 	return c.counts[key]
 }
+
+// Add increases the count for key by n.
+func (c *SafeCounter) Add(key string, n int) {
+	c.mu.Lock()
+	defer c.mu.Unlock()
+	c.counts[key] += n
+}

cases.name: no_lock
separate_lock
cases.diff:
diff --git a/counter/counter.go b/counter/counter.go
index 2b21749..0fe6228 100644
--- a/counter/counter.go
+++ b/counter/counter.go
@@ -27,3 +27,11 @@ func (c *SafeCounter) Get(key string) int {
 	defer c.mu.Unlock()
 	return c.counts[key]
 }
+
+// Add increases the count for key by n.
+func (c *SafeCounter) Add(key string, n int) {
+	var mu sync.Mutex
+	mu.Lock()
+	defer mu.Unlock()
+	c.counts[key] += n
+}

cases.name: sets_instead_of_adds
cases.diff:
diff --git a/counter/counter.go b/counter/counter.go
index 2b21749..5cd27e6 100644
--- a/counter/counter.go
+++ b/counter/counter.go
@@ -27,3 +27,10 @@ func (c *SafeCounter) Get(key string) int {
 	defer c.mu.Unlock()
 	return c.counts[key]
 }
+
+// Add increases the count for key by n.
+func (c *SafeCounter) Add(key string, n int) {
+	c.mu.Lock()
+	defer c.mu.Unlock()
+	c.counts[key] = n
+}
